text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Symboli Rudolf completely immerses herself in
her training, Narita Brian arrives to inform her
about a problem on the student council.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The general manager, not wanting to be a burden
to the president she respects, has asked to resign.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some thought, Symboli Rudolf asks the
general manager to come and watch her run in
the Satsuki Sho.
